name: PropertyElement.PropertyElementType.DetailViewLabelMarkPropertyElementTypes
summary: The DetailViewLabelMarkPropertyElementTypes class represents the available property element types for detail view label marks.

methods.name: DetailName
methods.summary: Returns the detail name property element type.

methods.name: DrawingName
methods.summary: Returns the drawing name property element type.

methods.name: Scale
methods.summary: Returns the scale property element type.

methods.name: SourceDrawingName
methods.summary: Returns the source drawing name property element type.

methods.name: SourceDrawingNameWhenMoved
methods.summary: Returns the source drawing name when moved property element type.
